item.title: Meh I say
item.dc:creator: NegasonicAdultEMP

item.title: Images of Note: Good Girl
item.description:
Count Binface: The Joke Candidate who had good policies.
Mood
Capycult. Capycult. Capycult. Capycult. Capycult. Capycult. Capycult.
it can still be one :)
Now I wanna listen to this album
Jax deserves this.
Skull Caverns, 20% mining, 80% fighting these fuckers.
Mood
This is basically the discord.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Well that goes hard
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii let's talk about breeding tractors.
I mean
We basically have turned Stardew into one big Mr Hands Reference on the stream
They were screaming while doing it.
The answer is Yes.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For STREAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.title: The legend Ronnie James Dio doing it in one single take
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth

item.title: Ok, so our sky just exploded ... (G5 solar storm timelapse)
item.description: I live south of Vienna, Austria, 47.5° latitute and i would have never dreamed of seeing northern lights in these colors and intensity at home. It was insane. I took my trusty old Canon 6D and a Sigma 20mm lens to capture some timelapse. www.jfs.photography NOAA reports a G5 solar storm which is the highest level.
item.dc:creator: pibyte

item.title: When you need a vest to tell people you're not dangerous, you just eat shit.
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
gross
this is so accurate
thought that was his tongue in the bottom left pic, for a second
one of my favorite movies as a kid, Little Monsters
you ain't cool unless you pee your pants
but why would they need... you know what, never mind
must mean a murder of crows
sorry gang
one of the more unhinged things i've seen
can't wait for this one
oh, we have those too
that's you guys
mmm hmm
not obscure but Superman 2 was one of the only movies we had, watched it a ton
this was once me, have calmed down a bit
do I!??!
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7
